svg.text: Graph database: two data stores, one Variant node
Each Variant node stores two data representations side by side
Two access paths serve 17 export formats
Used for: PCA, admixture, GWAS, phasing, imputation, relatedness
Skips gt_packed entirely. Reads K pre-computed values.
ac[k] = alt-allele count in population k · K populations (K=5 here)
Array length = K, independent of sample count N → O(K) per variant
Used for: population trees, demographic inference, allele frequency queries
